verdict.label: Go bodyboarding
verdict.headline: Go bodyboarding: Belgas Early morning
verdict.reason: Best combined score from the checked sources, with no major blocker for Belgas.

best.windFit: W 5 km/h · glassy · good wind fit
best.bestWind: ideal E/ENE/ESE, usable NE/SE, clean <=22 km/h

photo.credit: Photo: Tiago Lima, CC BY 2.0, via Wikimedia Commons

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

best.explanation: Belgas looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window: 0.6-0.9 m, 136 kJ, 11 s period, workable consistency 59/100, and glassy conditions.  An open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything; this is best for quiet, punchy peaks when Lagide is too small, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: scan from the dunes first because banks and channels shift fast.
best.shortExplanation: Belgas is an open beach break where the sandbanks decide everything · 0.6-0.9 m · 136 kJ · 11 s period · glassy conditions.

ranked.windFit: W 5 km/h · glassy · good wind fit
ranked.bestWind: ideal E/ESE/SE, usable NE/ENE/SSE, clean <=25 km/h

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

ranked.explanation: Lagide looks like a clean fun-sized window: 0.6-0.9 m, 87 kJ, 11 s period, workable consistency 60/100, and glassy conditions.  A dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides; this is best for clean, playful walls when the bigger beaches are too wild or too small.  Expect: it can get busy, and it is usually more flow than heavy barrel.
ranked.shortExplanation: Lagide is a dependable left-hand reef that turns modest swell into real rides · 0.6-0.9 m · 87 kJ · 11 s period · glassy conditions.

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

ranked.explanation: Almagreira looks like a clean fun-sized north coast window: 0.6-0.9 m, 78 kJ, 5 s period, workable consistency 59/100, and glassy conditions.  An exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal; this is best for small, clean north-coast days when protected spots look underpowered, so checking exposed beaches makes sense.  Expect: banks, rips and wind exposure decide whether it is magic or messy.
ranked.shortExplanation: Almagreira is an exposed north-coast beach break with more raw swell than Baleal · 0.6-0.9 m · 78 kJ · 5 s period · glassy conditions.

ranked.windFit: W 5 km/h · glassy · good wind fit

wetsuit.reason: 4/3 remains the safer default for Peniche unless water is warm and wind is light.

ranked.explanation: Cantinho da Baia looks like a clean small window: 0.3-0.6 m, 202 kJ, 11 s period, workable consistency 61/100, and glassy conditions.  A forgiving sandy bay with lots of take-off points; this is best for easy wave count and cleaner faces when the north wind is bothering exposed beaches.  Watch: spot surf looks too small.
ranked.shortExplanation: Cantinho da Baia is a forgiving sandy bay with lots of take-off points · 0.3-0.6 m · 202 kJ · 11 s period · glassy conditions · Watch: spot surf looks too small.
